name: SES AI Corp
business: SES AI Corp develops and manufactures AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal and Lithium-ion rechargeable batteries, battery materials, and software (Molecular Universe) for Energy Storage Systems, drones, Urban Air Mobility, robotics, and electric vehicles. The company also offers access to its Molecular Universe AI4Science platform on a subscription basis.
namedSuppliers: Hisun New Energy Materials Ltd. Co.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal ( Li-Metal ) and Lithium-ion ( Li-ion ) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems ( ESS ), Urban Air Mobility ( UAM ), drones, robotics, electric vehicles ( EVs ), and other applications.

We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal ( Li-Metal ) and Lithium-ion ( Li-ion ) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems ( ESS ), Urban Air Mobility ( UAM ), drones, robotics, electric vehicles ( EVs ), and other applications.

We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal ( Li-Metal ) and Lithium-ion ( Li-ion ) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems ( ESS ), Urban Air Mobility ( UAM ), drones, robotics, electric vehicles ( EVs ), and other applications.
Research and development expenses ... include ... costs incurred for renting graphic processing units ( GPUs ) to train AI models.
We believe the intersection of digital infrastructure and the need for power is one of the more critical themes of our time.

We are also planning to develop NDAA-compliant manufacturing capacity to develop drone cells with high energy and high-power density in our facility in Korea to meet the growing demand for NDAA-compliant cells.
To date, we have discovered six novel electrolyte materials across multiple applications through our Molecular Universe platform which are being tested with over 40 potential customers.

catalysts.event: Begin supplying materials manufactured through Hisun joint venture
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin supplying materials manufactured through the Hisun joint venture in the second half of 2026.
